steps.title: Identify the distance formula
steps.content:
To find how far the drone travels, we use the relationship:
$$\text{distance} = \text{speed} \times \text{time}$$
We're given a speed of $18$ m/s and a time of $5$ s.

steps.title: Calculate the distance
steps.content:
Substitute the given values into the formula:
$$\text{distance} = 18 \text{ m/s} \times 5 \text{ s} = 90 \text{ m}$$
That confirms A is correct.
